title: Ben Davies (rugby league, born 1989)
extract:
Benjamin (Ben) "Danger" Davies (born 2 November 1989) is a professional rugby league footballer who last played as a prop for Oldham in Kingstone Press League 1. He has previously played for:-

Wigan Warriors
Widnes Vikings
Workington Town
South Wales Scorpions
Barrow Raiders
Castleford Tigers
Halifax RLFC
Whitehaven RLFC
